# YOUR CODE HERE
points = ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E', 'F', 'G']
distances = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9]

p, q = input().split()
index_p = points.index(p)
index_q = points.index(q)

start = min(index_p, index_q)
end = max(index_p, index_q)

total_distance = sum(distances[start:end])
print(total_distance)
